titleStmt.title: Frankfurt, Universitätsbibliothek Johann Christian Senckenberg, Frankfurt Ms. or. 10
Old Testament Books

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msItem.title: Book of Samuel 1 = (Ethiopic) Book of Kings 1
msItem.note: Beginning of Book of Samuel 1 = (Ethiopic) Book of Kings 1.

msItem.locus: The text begins on f. ia at line 5.
msItem.title: Note

msItem.locus: The text begins on f. ib at line 9.
msItem.title: Apocalypse of Ezra
List of the names of the kings of Israel and Judah
Explanation and translation of the names of angels and some names of God
Books of Kings
msItem.note: There is no chapter division, the text is corrected in comparatively few places.

bibl.title: Biblia Veteris Testamenti Aethiopica, in quinque tomos distributa, ad librorum manuscriptorum fidem edidit et apparatu critico instruxit Dr. A.D., Professor Kiliensis. Veteris Testamenti Aethiopici Tomus Secundus sive Libri Regum, Paralipomenon, Esdrae, Esther ad librorum manuscriptorum fidem edidit et apparatu critico instruxit Dr. A.D., Professor Kiliensis
bibl.publisher: Sumptibus Societatis Germanorum Orientalis, Typis F. A. Brockhausii

msItem.title: Book of Samuel 1 = (Ethiopic) Book of Kings 1
msItem.note: Sam 17:21-31 are missing from pp. 48a, , but are then added on 311a–312.

msItem.title: Book of Samuel 2 = (Ethiopic) Book of Kings 2
List of the names of the kings of Israel and Judah
List of the names of the kings of Israel and Judah
Explanation of the names of God and angels

msItem.explicit: pp. 311a ተፈጸመ፡ በዝየ፡ ዘነገሥት፡ ፬ስብሐት፡ ለእግዚአብሔር። ። ዝመጽሐፍ፡ ዘሱራሔ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ወዘአቡሁ፡ መዝራዕተ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ወብእሲቱ፡ ዓመተ፡ ዮሐንስ። ኅቡረ፡ ይምሐሮሙ፡ በመንግሥተ፡ ሰማያት፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን።

msItem.title: ʾIyob
msItem.note: The book is divided into unnumbered chapters.
msItem.explicit: pp. 396bተፈጸመ፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ኢዮብ፡ ነቢይ፡ ወጻድቅ፡ በረድኤተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ወኍልቈ፡ ምራፋቲሁ፡ ፲ወ፭ ወስብሐት፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ለሥሉስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ እስከ፡ ለዓለም፡ አሜን።

msItem.title: Proverbs
msItem.note: Many parts of this work, towards the end even entire chapters, are misplaced.

msItem.title: Book of Isaiah
msItem.note: There is no chapter division, the beginnings of the following sections are rubricated: Is 1:1; 2:2; 6:1; 7:1; 13:1; 14:28; 15:1; 16:13; 17:1; 19:1; 20:1; 21:1; 21:11; 22:1; 26:9; 30:6; 38:1; 38:9.
msItem.explicit: pp. 515b በዝየ፡ ተፈጸመ፡ ትንቢተ፡ ኢሳይያስ፡ ነቢይ፡ ወስብሐት፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፨
msItem.colophon: pp. 515b እምዘ፡ ተወጥነ፡ አመ፡ ፲ለሐምሌ፡ ወተፈጸመ፡ አመ፡ ፳ሁ፡ ለውእቱ፡ ወርኅ፡ ወጸሐፊሁኒ፡ ወልዱ፡ ለእንባቆም፡ ፋደል፡ ዘተዓገሎ፡ ዘእንበለ፡ ፈቃድየ፡ ውጉዘ፡ ለይኩን፡ በሥልጣነ፡ ዚአየ፡ እምርስተ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ቅቡእ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፨

msItem.title: Apocalypse of Ezra
msItem.note: The work is divided into 141 chapters.

msItem.title: Daniel, Book of (includes Daniel, Susanna and Bel and the Dragon)
Susanna
msItem.note: The work is divided into four chapters.

msItem.title: Bel and the Dragon
msItem.explicit: ተፈጸመ፡ ራእይ፡ ዘዳንኤል፡ በአኰቴተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ሎቱ፡ ስብሐት፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን።

extent.note: The last leaf is cut in half vertically.

supportDesc.foliation: The manuscript is paginated in pencil in the upper outer corner of each page. Three guard leaves in the beginning have not been paginated.

handNote.seg: Content description of at the top of the pages until pp. 312, the ownership note in , chapter division.

item.desc: At the top of each page, the content is indicated in red.
The name of the original owner or scribe has been erased everywhere.
The name of Eduard Rüppell is added on the first page.
Note stating that the verses left out from are added at the end of the book.
item.q: ዘተረስዓ፡ ወዘተገድፈ፡ ሀሎ፡ ኀበ፡ ካልእ፡ መካን፡ ውስተ፡ ፍጻሜሁ፡ ለረቀ፡ ዝንቱ፡ መጽሐፍ።

binding.decoNote: Ethiopian binding, wooden boards covered with leather, slightly damaged

history.provenance: Bought by Eduard Rüppell between 1831 and 1834 in Ethiopia. While being transported from the Soviet to the American occupation zone on the 3rd July 1945, it fell from a truck, but was found on the same day and returned to the Universitätsbibliothek Johann Christian Senckenberg in 1950. See also Verlust und Wiederauffindung äthiopischer Handschriften aus der Sammlung RüppellAethiopicaBernhardTönnies201215228-232http://journals.sub.uni-hamburg.de/aethiopica/article/view/669HistoryManuscriptsLibrarybm:Toennies2012VerlustRüppellHistoryManuscriptsLibrarybm:Toennies2012VerlustRüppell.

bibl.title: Die Abessinischen Handschriften der Stadtbibliothek zu Frankfurt am Main (Rüppell'sche Sammlung) nebst Anhängen und Auszügen

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

assertion.unit: Remarks included at the end of

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

div.label: Remarks included at the end of
div.ab: ወሐይወ፡ ኢዮብ፡ እምድኅረ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ፻ወ፵ዓመት። ወበመጽሐፈ፡ ቅብጢ፡ ይብል፡ ፻ወ፸ዓመተ፡ ወኵሉ፡ አመታቲሁ፡ ለኢዮብ፡ ፪፻፵ወ፰ዓመት፡ ወርእየ፡ ኢዮብ፡ ደቂቆ፡ ወደቂቀ፡ ደቂቆ፡ እስከ፡ ራብዕ፡ ትውልድ፡ ወበመጽሐፈ፡ ካልዕ፡ ይቤ፡ እስከ፡ ሣልስ፡ ትውልድ። ወለሕቀ፡ ኢዮብ፡ ወጸግበ፡ መዋዕለ፡ ወሞተ፡ በርስእ፡ ሠናይ፡ ወበጽድቅ፡ ወበንጽሕ።

div.label: Remarks at the end of .
div.ab: ይቤሉ፡ መተርጕማን፡ እስመ፡ ኢዮብስ፡ ውእቱ፡ ኢዮባብ፡ ወልደ፡ ዘርኸ፡ ወልደ፡ ራግዋል፡ ወልደ፡ ኤሳው፡ ወልደ፡ ይስሐቅ፡ ወልደ፡ አብርሃም፡ ወይቤሉ፡ ካልአኒሆሙ፡ እስመ፡ ልሳኑ፡ ለኢዮብ፡ ኮነት፡ ሶርያዊተ፡ ወቦ፡ እለ፡ ይቤሉ፡ አረባዊ፡ ይእቲ። ወቦ፡ እለ፡ ይቤሉ፡ ካልአን፡ መተርጕማን፡ እስመ፡ ደቂቀ፡ እግዚአብሔርሰ፡ ዘይቤ፡ መላእክት፡ እሙንቱ። ወድርሳንሰ፡ ይኄሱ፡ ዘንተ፡ ዘይቤ፡ ሰብእ፡ ኄራን፡ እሙንቱ፡ እምሰብአ፡ ምሥራቅ፡ ዘቦሙ፡ ልማደ፡ ከመ፡ ይትጋብኡ፡ በበሰርቀ፡ ወርኅ፡ ወይሠውኡ፡ መሥዋዕተ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ወይትባረክ፡ ስሙ፡ ይቤ፡ መተርጕም፡ ያሌቡ፡ ዘንተ፡ ዘሀለዎሙ፡ ይማህርክዎ፡ ለልብንያን፡ መላእክት፡ እሙንቱ፡ በትእዛዘ፡ እግዚአብሔር። ። ።
